---
title: "Class 24032026 - 1"
author: César Tzoc Alvarado
date: "24/03/2026"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    theme:
      version: 4
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    social: menu
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)
```

# IRIS
## {.sidebar}
```{r}
nombres <- names(iris)
```

### Ventana 1
### Ventana 2

```{r}
```
